name: Angelicide
author: LexyCat

placementContext.reason: Angelicide presents an overwhelming challenge through its combination of extreme wave precision, tight ship corridors, and demanding timing-based gameplay. The level's sustained intensity with intricate dual sections and minimal consistency breaks creates an unforgiving experience that establishes it as a definitive Top 1 contender.

description: Angelicide delivers intense, precision-heavy gameplay featuring complex wave sections, tight ship timings, and challenging dual segments. The level maintains high difficulty throughout with minimal breaks, combining fast-paced mechanics with demanding accuracy requirements that test the absolute limits of player skill and consistency.
